points.title: Authentic Spice Gardens
points.description: Experience Sri Lanka's famous spice cultivation with guided tours through aromatic gardens featuring cinnamon, cardamom, pepper, cloves, nutmeg, and vanilla plantations.

points.title: Aluvihare Rock Temple
points.description: Visit the historic Buddhist temple where the Tripitaka scriptures were first written on palm leaves in 29 BCE, preserving Buddhist teachings for posterity.

points.title: Sri Muthumariamman Temple
points.description: Explore the magnificent Hindu temple featuring traditional Dravidian architecture, colorful gopurams, and intricate stone carvings dedicated to Goddess Mariamman.

points.title: Spice Processing Demonstrations
points.description: Witness traditional spice processing methods including cinnamon peeling, pepper drying, and cardamom harvesting techniques passed down through generations.

points.title: Colonial Heritage Sites
points.description: Discover remnants of British colonial rule including Fort MacDowall, Christ Church, the historic railway station, and the iconic clock tower.

points.title: Traditional Medicine Gardens
points.description: Learn about Ayurvedic medicinal plants and traditional healing practices using local herbs and spices in authentic medicinal gardens.

points.title: Local Markets and Crafts
points.description: Explore vibrant local markets selling fresh spices, traditional crafts, handwoven textiles, and authentic Sri Lankan products.
